title: Theory of Computation - Finite Automata - Theoretical/Not Answered

questions.question:
Consider the machine \( M \):

The language recognized by \( M \) is:



GATE CSE 2005 | Question: 53
options: \( \left\{ w \in \{a, b\}^* \text{| every a in w is followed by exactly two b ’s} \right\} \)
\( \left\{w \in \{a, b\}^* \text{| every a in w is followed by at least two b ’s} \right\} \)
\( \left\{w \in \{a, b\}^* \text{| w contains the substring ‘ abb ’} \right\} \)
\( \left\{w \in \{a, b\}^* \text{| w does not contain ‘ aa ’ as a substring} \right\} \)
